demographic_profile.summary: Professional engineers working for exploration and production companies who design, implement, and optimize drilling and well completion operations. They make purchasing decisions based on technical specifications, operational requirements, and proven field performance rather than cost alone. They are frustrated by equipment failures, regulatory compliance challenges, and technologies that don't deliver promised operational improvements in real field conditions.
